title: rosa × dumetorum var. deseglisei
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. deseglisei, also known as Rosa dumetorum or Dog Rose, is a variety of wild rose that is a hybrid of the Rosa dumetorum and Rosa canina species. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and salicylic acid. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. deseglisei include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation and pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
